name: Wind Waker
description: Proof enough to some that unseen forces manipulate the happenings of the material plane.

abilities.name: Cyclone
abilities.description: Sweeps the target up into a cyclone, applying a basic dispel, turning them invulnerable for a short while. Cooldown: 19. Mana Cost: 175. Cast Range: 550. Duration: 2.5. Damage: 50. Set Speed: 300. If the target is an enemy, they also take damage upon landing. Cannot lift up Roshan, instead, it instantly applies the damage.
